extrapolation_envelope_verbatim: Binding on ANY outcome: deconf-b is a formal/oracle-addressed covered-slice G2-class DIAGNOSTIC (PROPOSED-ASM-1014) — never W1, never G4; it licenses NO competitiveness sentence in any direction. BM25-only is a cheap lexical PRECURSOR: 'no generic signal reproduces it' and 'no strong generic RAG baseline reproduces it' are BOTH outside the licence space — only 'the pinned lexical precursor (BM25 + pinned self-consistency acceptance) at matched budget does / does not'; the RAGC menu and manifest own every wider claim and supersede these cells for all G4/W1 use. R-1/SmolLM2-135M only: no extrapolation to the 100M-2B rung range; sign-only language is not licensed because no scale contrast exists here. A PASS (ALIGNMENT-SPECIFIC) licenses exactly: verify-retry against an item-aligned deterministic answer key lifts a 135M host on this self-authored kernel-covered oracle-addressed slice; the kernel is one way to AUTHOR such a key; no kernel-specific runtime contribution is measured (A1) — routing all remaining kernel value to the authoring/economics legs (knull-v2 content, A-F0 mint cost). A NULL (ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE) is scoped to this instantiation and feeds K-P3v2(4) at this scope only. External-gold scoring inherits the d-adj-t protocol's own limits (single human judge-1 + one-model-family tie-break, as disclosed in the f2b-transfer record). Coverage disclosure, mandatory: kernel-expressibility coverage 0.3542 at rung molecules-v0, MEASURED by m0b on one incomplete kernel-v0 instance, NOT general coverage. Every verdict sentence names its licensing arm and carries the rider verbatim: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity.
hypotheses: H-ALIGN (load-bearing): the external-gold verify-retry lift requires the item-aligned deterministic acceptance — Delta_align = acc_ext(gsa-verify-retry) - acc_ext(gr-d-lite) exceeds delta_sup = 0.05 (Holm-adjusted one-sided test, PROPOSED-ASM-1107); combined with the A1 certificate (the checker reads nothing beyond the urn-keyed answer-key projection) the licensed sentence on PASS is exactly: verify-retry against an item-aligned deterministic answer key lifts a 135M host on this self-authored kernel-covered oracle-addressed slice; the kernel is one way to AUTHOR such a key; no kernel-specific runtime contribution is measured. [rider: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity]

H-GENERIC (the alternative, equal prominence): the generic lexical loop reproduces the aligned-key arm within delta_eq = 0.05 (TOST: 90% BCa CI of Delta_align inside the band) => ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE — the measured input to the K-P3v2(4) attribution-collapse kill at this scope (and this scope only; the programme-level kill still requires the RAGC manifest cells); the F2 line survives only as generic lexical retrieval + self-consistency retry at matched budget. H-BRIDGE (instrument premise, gated not hypothesised): the aligned-store lift itself reproduces on external gold at n=333 x 5 seeds — bridge gate lift_ext(gsa-verify-retry over model-alone) one-sided 95% BCa LB > +0.05; failure => INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B, nothing attributed, and a bridge failure against the landed f2b-transfer stage-2 result (+0.2507 measured at the 250-prefix, PASS-PENDING-AUDIT) is a flagged inconsistency to investigate (ASM-0964). kill_criterion_verbatim: deconf-b feeds ONE kill and carries NO independent kill of its own: verdict NULL (ATTRIBUTION-COLLAPSE-AT-SCOPE — the 90% BCa CI of Delta_align entirely inside +/-0.05 on the 333-item x 5-seed external-gold grid) is the measured input to the K-P3v2(4) attribution-collapse kill AT THIS SCOPE: the pinned lexical precursor (BM25 + self-consistency at matched budget through the identical retry topology) reproduces the aligned-key arm within the equivalence margin WITHOUT the aligned key, and the F2 line survives only as generic lexical retrieval + self-consistency retry at matched budget; the PROGRAMME-level kill still requires the RAGC manifest cells at G4. The deflationary outcome gets EQUAL prominence with any positive (the knull discipline verbatim), with the rescue paths named IN the verdict: (i) authored-content superiority (knull-v2 PASS-CONTENT), (ii) authoring economics (A-F0), (iii) any A1/A2 post-triage residual candidate — none licensed by this record. Degeneracy discipline: P10 extraction failure, RT-7a non-engagement, baseline saturation and bridge failure are INSTRUMENT-INVALID-at-B by pre-registered gates — they can never read as PASS, NULL, or INCONCLUSIVE evidence. Rider on every sentence, verbatim: self-authored items, kernel-covered slice, oracle-addressed store; external adjudication removes membership-gold circularity, not item-generation or store-addressing circularity.
